name: Intoxicating Kiss
outcome: [AttackerName] keeps [AttackerHisOrHer] arms firmly locked around [TargetName]'s neck while [AttackerHeOrShe] deeply kisses [TargetHimOrHer], lewdly gazing into [TargetHisOrHer] eyes while [AttackerHisOrHer] tongue slowly circles around [TargetHisOrHer]. [AttackerName] keeps the kiss mind numbingly deep, and [TargetName] can only moan as [AttackerHeOrShe] forces [TargetHimOrHer] to drink down gulp after gulp of aphrodisiac laced saliva.
miss: [AttackerName] keeps [AttackerHisOrHer] arms firmly locked around [TargetName]'s neck while [AttackerHeOrShe] deeply kisses [TargetHimOrHer], but [TargetName] manages to endure the intense kiss!
statusOutcome: [AttackerName]'s suddenly aphrodisiac laden saliva is starting to affect [TargetName], filling [TargetHimOrHer] with warm tingly desire...
